about.title: About Nice Place
about.body:
Nice Place helps you discover quiet outdoor spots, sunset points, and hidden places worth visiting.

This beta focuses on map-based discovery, saving places, sharing spots, and community submissions reviewed before they appear publicly.

terms.title: Terms of Service

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Last updated: July 2026

Nice Place is a mobile app that helps you discover and share outdoor places. This policy explains what data we collect during the beta and how we use it.

Account and authentication
When you create an account, we store your email address and authentication details through Supabase Auth. We also store profile information you choose to provide, such as your display name.

Places you submit
When you add a place, we store the information you submit, including place name, description, category, approximate location coordinates, and any photos you upload.

Saved and liked places
When you are signed in, we store places you save and places you like so they sync with your account.

Location
If you grant permission, we use your device location to show nearby places on the map and sort results by distance. We do not track your location in the background.

Images
If you upload a cover photo for a place, that image is stored so it can be shown in the app.

Device storage
Some preferences, such as theme settings and recent searches, may be stored locally on your device.

How we use your data
We use this data to operate the app, display places on the map, sync your saved and liked places, and review community submissions.

Service provider
We use Supabase (supabase.com) for authentication, database storage, and file storage for uploaded images. Supabase processes data on our behalf.

Data sharing
We do not sell your personal data.

Data deletion
You can delete your account from Settings. This removes your account access and anonymizes your profile data.

{{supportContact}}

Children
Nice Place is not directed at children under 13.

Contact
{{supportEmail}}

guidelines.title: Report Guidelines
guidelines.body:
Report inaccurate, unsafe, or inappropriate places so the community stays trustworthy.

In-app reporting is coming soon. For now, email support@niceplace.site if a place should be reviewed or removed.
